name: Chocolate, Passion Fruit and Summer Savory
steps: Pick all leaves from the stalk.
Blanch the blanched leaves with the oil in the thermomix at 70C for 5 min.
Blend the mixture and strain.
Pass through muslin onto an ice bath.
Store in fridge.
Add little water to the sugar and cook to 121C.
While the sugar is cooking, start whipping the egg whites.
Once the sugar syrup has reached 121C add it over the meringue.
Cold the meringue's sable and stiff add the cold the meringue.
Store in piping bag.
Bring the milk to the boil.
Add the boiling milk to the yolks.
Cook the mixture to 84C.
Add the gelatine to the chocolate.
Using cocktail blend the emulsion.
Blender in the passion fruit puree.
Scoop in the cream and fold into the chocolate.
Store in container in the fridge.
In a pan bring the water and the sugar to 117C.
Once it reaches temperature add the black sesame and mix until it is completely covered.
